basic_details.job_title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 53 Professor, Associate Professor and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Teaching Faculty (Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor)
basic_details.short_information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released under Advt No. 09/2026 on the official website. A total of 53 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Teaching Faculty (Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 70 years for all posts.

qualification.details: Professor: As per latest NMC regulations notified on 30-06-2025 Associate Professor: As per latest NMC regulations notified on 30-06-2025 Assistant Professor: As per latest NMC regulations notified on 30-06-2025 Updated NMC/State Medical Council registration is mandatory for all posts.

salary_details.professor: Basic pay of Rs.123100/- + Other allowances
salary_details.associate professor: Basic pay of Rs.78,800/- + Other allowances
salary_details.assistant professor: Basic pay of Rs.67,700/- + Other allowances

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled to be held on 20th, 21st, and 22nd May 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on one of these dates.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by ESIC?
faq.answer: ESIC has announced a total of 53 vacancies for Teaching Faculty positions, including Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Teaching Faculty posts is 70 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for the ESIC Teaching Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee varies by category: Rs. 300/- for General/OBC, Rs. 125/- for SC/ST. PwBD and Women candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Teaching Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 67,700 to Rs. 123,100 per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The qualification must be as per the latest NMC regulations notified on 30-06-2025, and updated NMC/State Medical Council registration is mandatory.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the ESIC Teaching Faculty positions?
faq.answer: These positions are filled through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to report to the venue with all required documents on the specified dates.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the ESIC Medical College and Hospital located?
faq.answer: ESIC Medical College and Hospital is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 400093.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify age relaxation for reserved categories. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for details.
